/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/boost_chat_server.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/boost_chat_server.dir/src/util/Log.cpp.o CMakeFiles/boost_chat_server.dir/src/core/ChatRoom.cpp.o CMakeFiles/boost_chat_server.dir/src/core/RoomManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/boost_chat_server.dir/src/core/CommandParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/boost_chat_server.dir/src/net/TcpServer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/boost_chat_server.dir/src/net/TcpSession.cpp.o CMakeFiles/boost_chat_server.dir/src/net/WsServer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/boost_chat_server.dir/src/net/WsSession.cpp.o -o boost_chat_server  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_json.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_container.so.1.83.0
